title: coleus lateriticola
intro: Coleus lateriticola, also known as the "Acmadenia" or "Bergamot Coleus," is a plant species that belongs to the Lamiaceae family and is native to South Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Coleus lateriticola include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and providing relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Coleus lateriticola can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
